assignment_description:
Hand Clapping: Song & Rhythm
⍞ Materials: Playground Songs & Rhymes

PREP: Learn song and motions.
“Hot Cross Buns" p.15

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1\. Listen to the song several times.
2\. Listen and repeat one line at a time.
3\. Clap to the rhythm while you sing.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns

Hand Clapping: Motions
Hot Cross Buns

➜ RECAP
Sing the song with the audio.

➜ PRACTICE
1\. Learn motions, saying them while moving.
2\. Sing the name of motions to the rhythm.
3\. Listen to audio while doing motions.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns

Hand Clapping: Motions & Singing
Hot Cross Buns

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1\. Listen to audio while doing motions.
2\. Sing the song while doing motions.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns

Hand Clapping: Practice & Variations
Hot Cross Buns

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
Practice motions while singing the song. Experiment with various speeds if ready.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns

Passing Game: Song & Rhythm
⍞ Materials: Playground Songs & Rhymes

PREP: Learn song and motions.
"Where, Oh, Where" p.85

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1\. Listen to the song several times.
2\. Listen and repeat one line at a time.
3\. Clap to the rhythm while you sing.
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Passing Game: Motions
Where, Oh, Where

➜ RECAP
Sing the song with the audio.

➜ PRACTICE
1\. Learn motions, saying them while moving.
2\. Sing the name of motions to the rhythm.
3\. Listen to audio while doing motions.
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Passing Game: Motions & Singing
Where, Oh, Where
⍞ Materials: Rhythm Stick (or other object to pass)

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
1\. Listen to the audio while doing motions.
2\. Sing the song while doing motions.
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Passing Game: Practice & Variations
Where, Oh, Where
⍞ Materials: Rhythm Stick (or other object to pass)

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
Practice motions while singing the song. Experiment with various speeds if ready.
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Practice: Both Songs
Hot Cross Buns; Where, Oh, Where
⍞ Materials: Rhythm Stick (or other object to pass)

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
Sing with the audio once and then without, combining with motions.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Practice: Both Songs
Hot Cross Buns; Where, Oh, Where
⍞ Materials: Rhythm Stick (or other object to pass)

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
Sing with the audio once and then without, combining with motions.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Practice: Both Songs
Hot Cross Buns; Where, Oh, Where
⍞ Materials: Rhythm Stick (or other object to pass)

➜ LISTEN & PRACTICE
Sing with the audio once and then without, combining with motions.
∞ Audio Link: Hot Cross Buns
∞ Audio Link: Where, Oh, Where

Exam Week

➜ EXAMS
Answer question(s) related to course.

Questions will come from:
Playground Songs & Rhymes & Book of Song Dances
assignment_teachersNote:
★ Playground Songs & Rhymes — TERM 1 EXAM QUESTIONS
·  Perform "Hot Cross Buns" OR "Where, Oh, Where" for the teacher to observe.
